chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-1527 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 26.09.2025 Mr. Muhammad Aslam Gadani, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Ghulam Abass Awan, Advocate for the respondent No.6. Mr. Naveed Ahmed Shah, Deputy Attorney General..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- The counsel for the petitioner, under instructions does not press the instant petition. Accordingly, instant petition is hereby dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
